title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 41
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a lost water bottle.
items.audio_script: Girl: Did you finally find your water bottle? You looked everywhere before class this morning. || Boy: Yes, but not where I expected. I checked the sports field, because I remembered using it there yesterday. || Girl: And did you try the school bus? You said you went there afterwards. || Boy: I did, but nobody had seen it. Then my coach sent me a message and said [1]I had left my water bottle on the reception desk[/1]. I must have put it there without noticing. || Girl: What a relief. You will need it later. || Boy: Exactly. I'll pick it up before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Did you finally find your water bottle? You looked everywhere before class this morning.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I checked the sports field, because I remembered using it there yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: And did you try the school bus? You said you went there afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I did, but nobody had seen it. Then my coach sent me a message and said I had left my water bottle on the reception desk. I must have put it there without noticing.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: What a relief. You will need it later.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Exactly. I'll pick it up before lunch.

items.question: Where is the water bottle?
items.explanation: The speaker says they had left the water bottle on the reception desk.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are we still going to the outdoor concert after school? I was looking forward to it. || Man: I don't think so. The band has cancelled, so that plan will not work today. || Woman: We could watch a film instead. That might be fun. || Man: I checked, but there are no seats left. My cousin had a different idea: [2]we are going to visit a pottery workshop this afternoon[/2]. || Woman: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station? || Man: Yes, at four o'clock. Then we can go together before dinner.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are we still going to the outdoor concert after school? I was looking forward to it.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I don't think so. The band has cancelled, so that plan will not work today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: We could watch a film instead. That might be fun.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I checked, but there are no seats left. My cousin had a different idea: we are going to visit a pottery workshop this afternoon.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, at four o'clock. Then we can go together before dinner.

items.question: What are the friends going to do?
items.explanation: The speaker says they are going to visit a pottery workshop this afternoon.

items.context: You hear two students talking about the school camping night.
items.audio_script: Boy: Have you packed for the school camping night tomorrow? I'm trying not to take things I will not use. || Girl: Almost. I was going to bring a towel, but the teacher said we will not need that there. || Boy: What about a notebook? Do we need that? || Girl: Not this time. The message says [3]everyone needs to bring a torch because the path to the tents gets dark early[/3]. || Boy: Thanks for telling me. I will put it in my bag now. || Girl: Good idea. We leave early, and there will not be time to go back home.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Have you packed for the school camping night tomorrow? I'm trying not to take things I will not use.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Almost. I was going to bring a towel, but the teacher said we will not need that there.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: What about a notebook? Do we need that?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Not this time. The message says everyone needs to bring a torch because the path to the tents gets dark early.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Thanks for telling me. I will put it in my bag now.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Good idea. We leave early, and there will not be time to go back home.

items.question: What should the student take?
items.explanation: The speaker says everyone needs to bring a torch because the path to the tents gets dark early.

items.context: You hear two people choosing food in a cafe.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you chosen what to order for lunch? The queue is getting longer behind us. || Man: Not yet. I considered chicken soup, but I had that yesterday. || Woman: What about the cheese sandwich? It looks good today. || Man: I thought about that too, but it looks too small. I think [4]I'll have the baked potato because it comes with salad[/4]. || Woman: Good choice. I'll decide while you pay. || Man: Fine. Let's find seats by the window before all the tables are taken. We still have time before class begins.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you chosen what to order for lunch? The queue is getting longer behind us.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not yet. I considered chicken soup, but I had that yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What about the cheese sandwich? It looks good today.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I thought about that too, but it looks too small. I think I'll have the baked potato because it comes with salad.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good choice. I'll decide while you pay.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Fine. Let's find seats by the window before all the tables are taken. We still have time before class begins.

items.question: What food does the speaker choose?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses the baked potato because it comes with salad.

items.context: You hear two students talking about the photography club.
items.audio_script: Woman: Did you see the message about the photography club this afternoon? I was going straight to the art room. || Girl: Do not go there, because students are taking an exam there. The teacher cannot use that room today. || Woman: Oh. I heard some people were waiting by the library. || Girl: That is wrong too, because it closes early today. The latest message says [5]we must meet in the science lab after lunch[/5]. || Woman: Thanks. I would have gone to the wrong place. || Girl: I will tell the others before registration, so nobody misses the start.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you see the message about the photography club this afternoon? I was going straight to the art room.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Do not go there, because students are taking an exam there. The teacher cannot use that room today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Oh. I heard some people were waiting by the library.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: That is wrong too, because it closes early today. The latest message says we must meet in the science lab after lunch.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Thanks. I would have gone to the wrong place.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I will tell the others before registration, so nobody misses the start.

items.question: Where should students go for the photography club?
items.explanation: The latest message says they must meet in the science lab after lunch.

items.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the gallery.
items.audio_script: Man: How are you getting to the gallery tomorrow? I thought you were going to walk. || Boy: I was, but it is farther than I thought, so it is not a good idea now. || Man: Could you take the bus instead? It might be quicker. || Boy: I checked, but the next one is too late. [6]I'm taking the train because it stops close to the entrance[/6]. || Man: That makes sense. When will you arrive? || Boy: Just before ten. I will send you a message when I get there, and we can meet near the entrance.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: How are you getting to the gallery tomorrow? I thought you were going to walk.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I was, but it is farther than I thought, so it is not a good idea now.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Could you take the bus instead? It might be quicker.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I checked, but the next one is too late. I'm taking the train because it stops close to the entrance.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That makes sense. When will you arrive?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Just before ten. I will send you a message when I get there, and we can meet near the entrance.

items.question: How will the speaker get to the gallery?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses this way of travelling because it stops close to the entrance.

items.context: You hear two people talking about work at the bookshop.
items.audio_script: Woman: What are you doing at the bookshop this afternoon? I thought you had to clean the windows. || Man: That was yesterday. Someone else has already done it this morning. || Woman: So are you going to carry boxes upstairs instead? || Man: No, because the lift is not working. The manager said [7]my job today is to put new books on the shelves[/7]. || Woman: That sounds manageable. Will you finish by five? || Man: I hope so. If it stays quiet, I should finish early and have time to meet my friends afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What are you doing at the bookshop this afternoon? I thought you had to clean the windows.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That was yesterday. Someone else has already done it this morning.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: So are you going to carry boxes upstairs instead?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: No, because the lift is not working. The manager said my job today is to put new books on the shelves.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds manageable. Will you finish by five?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I hope so. If it stays quiet, I should finish early and have time to meet my friends afterwards.

items.question: What job will the speaker do?
items.explanation: The speaker says their job today is to put new books on the shelves.
